Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

NectarShare.com, pre-launch beta test for pariprashnena users

Other · asked by user [] · 2007-12-05 · 5 answers
Here at iskcontech.com, we are making the final touches to the coolest ad-site for devotees.
Click here http://www.nectarshare.com or at the dynamic menu at bottom left and leave your comments at this thread.
Thank you, Hare Krishna!
user [13] · 2007-12-05
Can we have more views?

For example, Id like to be able to filter based on geography. Im in the US right now, but at the moment I normally live in AU, so those ads are most relevant to me, although they are all interesting...
user [13] · 2007-12-05
oh, ok - i see the geography filter there...

That was quick - thanks! ;-)
user [13] · 2007-12-05
Maybe you should put the code on there somewhere for people to put it on their website. Ill put it on Planet ISKCON if I can get the code.

I mean for the feed, like on the left hand side here.
user [1] · 2007-12-05
Here you are, code for dynamic feed:

<script type="text/javascript" src="http://www.google.com/reader/ui/publisher-en.js"></script>
<script type="text/javascript" src="http://www.google.com/reader/public/javascript/user/16757502846544603984/label/NectarShare?n=5&callback=GRC_p(%7Bc%3A%22green%22%2Ct%3A%22%5C%22NectarShare%5C%22%20via%20IskconTech.%22%2Cs%3A%22false%22%2Cb%3A%22false%22%7D)%3Bnew%20GRC"></script>
user [40] · 2007-12-07
Its very practical, easy to use and easy to add a post

should be very useful because it is focussed on a particular purpose
